description: Hardcoded instanceof chain for BooleanExpression compilation
reasoning: Switch Statements on type smell -> OCP violation because the buildCondition method uses an explicit instanceof chain to dispatch compilation logic for different BooleanExpression types. Adding a new expression type to the IR requires modifying this central compiler method rather than extending the system through polymorphism or a visitor pattern.

description: Hardcoded case statement for configuration validators
reasoning: Switch Statements on type smell -> OCP violation because the validate_value method uses a massive case statement to handle all possible configuration validators. Adding a new validator type (e.g., :sha_256_hex) requires modifying this core mixin file instead of registering a new validator object in a registry.
